entries.note: Application by examination, nonrefundable; NPTE $485 to FSBPT separate; temporary permit $50; re-exam $50

entries.expected: 22 hours of continuing competency per biennial renewal period, including 2 hours of ethics and Indiana jurisprudence coursework; licenses expire June 30 of even-numbered years; renewal fee $100
